day1_opening.name: 私
day1_opening.text: *桜が舞い散る。暖かい春風が制服の隙間に染み込んでくる。今日からこの学校の生徒だ。*

day1_opening_2.name: 私
day1_opening_2.text: *新しい学校の校門前。少し緊張するけど、悪くないドキドキだ。*

day1_opening_4.name: 私
day1_opening_4.text: *Starting today, I'm a student at this school.*

day1_opening_5.name: 私
day1_opening_5.text: *...Transferring. It's my first time. It was unavoidable because of my parents' work, but honestly — I'm a little anxious.*

day1_opening_6.name: 私
day1_opening_6.text: *I can keep in touch with my old friends over social media. That's just how things are these days.*

day1_opening_7.name: 私
day1_opening_7.text: *A cherry blossom petal grazes my nose. ...Pretty. Let's take it as a good sign.*

day1_gate_1.name: 私
day1_gate_1.text: *I'm standing in front of an unfamiliar school gate.*

day1_gate_2.name: 私
day1_gate_2.text: *It's a pretty big school. The building is clean and the schoolyard is wide. The facilities look better than my last school.*

day1_gate_3.name: 私
day1_gate_3.text: *Students pass through the gate in small groups. A perfectly ordinary morning scene — laughing and chatting.*

day1_gate_4.name: 私
day1_gate_4.text: *...Nobody pays any attention to me. Of course. Nobody knows me yet.*

day1_gate_5.name: 私
day1_gate_5.text: *My heart is pounding. A new school, new friends... I hope only good things happen.*

day1_hallway_1.name: 私
day1_hallway_1.text: *深呼吸一回。……なんとかなるだろ。入ろう。*

day1_hallway_2.name: 私
day1_hallway_2.text: *I walk down the hallway. I have no idea where I'm going.*

day1_hallway_3.name: 私
day1_hallway_3.text: *Even looking at the map, I can't figure out where the classroom is. First-year building... second-year building... main building? annex?*

day1_hallway_4.name: 私
day1_hallway_4.text: *I think about asking a student passing by, but everyone rushes past.*

day1_sea_meet_1.name: 私
day1_sea_meet_1.text: *Getting lost on the first day. This is why I hate transferring.*

day1_sea_meet_2.text: "Hey — are you the transfer student? I heard you were coming today."

day1_sea_meet_3.name: 私
day1_sea_meet_3.text: *I turn around. There's a girl with a neat appearance standing there.*

day1_sea_meet_4.name: 私
day1_sea_meet_4.text: *Short hair, uniform worn neatly. A class president badge on her chest.*

day1_sea_meet_7.name: 私
day1_sea_meet_7.text: "Oh, yeah, that's me... How did you know my name?"

day1_sea_meet_8.name: ハン・セア
day1_sea_meet_8.text: "Our homeroom teacher told me. She let me know in advance that a transfer student was coming."

day1_sea_meet_10.name: 私
day1_sea_meet_10.text: *Makes sense for the class president to know ahead of time.*

day1_sea_meet_11.name: ハン・セア
day1_sea_meet_11.text: "Were you looking for your classroom? Follow me — I'll show you the way."

day1_sea_meet_12.name: 私
day1_sea_meet_12.text: "Thanks. Honestly I was getting a little lost, the building is huge."

day1_sea_meet_13.name: ハン・セア
day1_sea_meet_13.text: "Everyone's like that at first. I circled the entire building looking for a bathroom in my first year."

day1_sea_meet_14.name: 私
day1_sea_meet_14.text: *Sea walks ahead. She points things out as we go down the hallway.*

day1_sea_meet_15.name: ハン・セア
day1_sea_meet_15.text: "This is the science room, and the music room is at the far end. The second floor is the third-years, so you probably won't need to go there."

day1_sea_meet_17.name: ハン・セア
day1_sea_meet_17.text: "You'll get used to it fast. Within a week you'll know it with your eyes closed."

day1_sea_meet_18.name: ハン・セア
day1_sea_meet_18.text: "Oh, and the school store is at the far end of the first floor. The line gets long during lunch so it's good to know in advance."

day1_sea_meet_19.name: 私
day1_sea_meet_19.text: "Wow, so helpful. Is it because you're class president?"

day1_choco_3.name: ハン・セア
day1_choco_3.text: "But mostly — if I see someone new wandering around, I just want to help."

day1_choco_4.name: 私
day1_choco_4.text: *She seems like a good person. Meeting someone this kind on my very first day.*

day1_choco_5.name: 私
day1_choco_5.text: *On the way to the classroom, Sea pulls something out of her bag.*

day1_choco_6.name: ハン・セア
day1_choco_6.text: "Oh right, here. Chocolate milk — you like this, right?"

day1_choco_7.name: 私
day1_choco_7.text: *She holds out a small carton of chocolate milk.*

day1_choco_8.name: 私
day1_choco_8.text: *...Chocolate milk? I never told anyone I liked this. I don't even remember drinking it at my old school.*

day1_choco_choice.name: ハン・セア
day1_choco_choice.text: "You were nervous and skipped breakfast, right? An empty stomach makes everything worse. At least drink this."
choices: "...How did you know I liked this?"
"Actually, I'm more of a strawberry milk person."

day1_choco_accept_1.name: 私
day1_choco_accept_1.text: *I stab in the straw and take a sip. It's sweet. Tastes good.*

day1_choco_accept_3.name: ハン・セア
day1_choco_accept_3.text: "Right? I somehow had a feeling you'd like chocolate milk."

day1_choco_accept_4.name: 私
day1_choco_accept_4.text: *A feeling? Well, most people like it.*

day1_choco_question_1.name: 私
day1_choco_question_1.text: "...Wait, how do you know I like chocolate milk?"

day1_choco_question_2.name: ハン・セア
day1_choco_question_2.text: "...Just a feeling? Most people like it. Should I swap it for strawberry?"

day1_choco_question_3.name: 私
day1_choco_question_3.text: *For a moment her expression flickered. ...Or maybe not. Maybe she just got flustered.*

day1_choco_question_4.name: 私
day1_choco_question_4.text: "No, you're right. I do like it. Thanks."

day1_choco_question_6.name: 私
day1_choco_question_6.text: *Sea smiles. I must have imagined that look in her eyes.*

day1_choco_joke_2.name: ハン・セア
day1_choco_joke_2.text: "Oh really? I'll bring strawberry next time. Promise!"

day1_choco_joke_3.name: 私
day1_choco_joke_3.text: "No no, this is fine too. Thanks."

day1_choco_joke_4.name: 私
day1_choco_joke_4.text: *I walk along, sipping the chocolate milk. Sweet. My nerves are starting to ease a little.*

day1_classroom_3.name: 私
day1_classroom_3.text: *I open the door and walk in — every head in the class turns to look at me.*

day1_classroom_4.name: 私
day1_classroom_4.text: *...I'm nervous. I hear murmuring. 'It's the transfer student.' 'Where did they come from?' That kind of thing.*

day1_classroom_5.name: ハン・セア
day1_classroom_5.text: "Your seat is over there by the window. Want to set down your stuff? You can introduce yourself when the homeroom teacher arrives."

day1_classroom_7.name: 私
day1_classroom_7.text: *I put my bag down and take my seat. A window seat. Cherry blossoms are visible through the glass. Not bad.*

day1_classroom_8.name: 私
day1_classroom_8.text: *The boy at the next desk leans over.*

day1_classroom_9.name: 隣の男子生徒
day1_classroom_9.text: "Hey, you're the transfer? Where did you come from?"

day1_classroom_11.name: 隣の男子生徒
day1_classroom_11.text: "Oh yeah? This place is pretty decent. Good school lunches, teachers are alright."

day1_classroom_12.name: 私
day1_classroom_12.text: "That's a relief. Sounds like I'll fit in."

day1_eunsu_1.name: 私
day1_eunsu_1.text: *Mid-chat, the classroom door opens and the homeroom teacher walks in.*

day1_eunsu_2.name: 私
day1_eunsu_2.text: *A young male teacher in glasses. Warm, approachable look.*

day1_eunsu_3.name: パク・ウンス
day1_eunsu_3.text: "Alright everyone. I'd like to introduce a new transfer student joining us today."

day1_eunsu_5.name: パク・ウンス
day1_eunsu_5.text: "{name}, would you come up front and introduce yourself?"

day1_eunsu_6.name: 私
day1_eunsu_6.text: *Standing at the front of the class makes it worse. Thirty pairs of eyes on me.*

day1_eunsu_7.name: パク・ウンス
day1_eunsu_7.text: "I've been looking forward to this. Transfer students are quite rare here."

day1_eunsu_8.name: 私
day1_eunsu_8.text: *...Rare? I guess not many people transfer into this school.*

day1_eunsu_10.name: 私
day1_eunsu_10.text: "Hello. I'm {name}. I transferred from ○○ High. Nice to meet you all."

day1_eunsu_11.name: 私
day1_eunsu_11.text: *Kept it short. I had no idea what else to say.*

day1_eunsu_12.name: パク・ウンス
day1_eunsu_12.text: "Any hobbies or things you like? I'm sure everyone would love to know more."

day1_eunsu_13.name: 私
day1_eunsu_13.text: "Um... I like gaming and listening to music."

day1_eunsu_14.name: 私
day1_eunsu_14.text: *A few people smile. Probably because it's such a standard answer.*

day1_eunsu_15.name: パク・ウンス
day1_eunsu_15.text: "Great. Please look after {name}, everyone. Alright, {name} — your seat is in the back row by the window. Go ahead."

day1_class_1.name: 私
day1_class_1.text: *I walk back to my seat. Sea gives me a thumbs up. Eunsu-sensei smiles warmly.*

day1_class_2.name: 私
day1_class_2.text: *...Not bad for a first introduction. What a relief.*

day1_class_3.name: 私
day1_class_3.text: *It's Korean class. Eunsu-sensei teaches it directly.*

day1_class_4.name: パク・ウンス
day1_class_4.text: "Today we're reading contemporary poetry. {name}, how far did you get at your previous school?"

day1_class_6.name: パク・ウンス
day1_class_6.text: "That works out nicely. You can just follow along from here."

day1_class_7.name: 私
day1_class_7.text: *I sit through the lecture. Eunsu-sensei explains things in a way that's actually interesting. The whole class is paying attention.*

day1_break_1.name: 私
day1_break_1.text: *This class has a good atmosphere. Quieter and more organized than my last school.*

day1_break_2.name: 私
day1_break_2.text: *Break time. A few students come to talk to me.*

day1_break_3.name: 女子生徒A
day1_break_3.text: "We were just curious about you~ What was your old school like?"

day1_break_4.name: 私
day1_break_4.text: "Pretty ordinary. The building was a bit smaller than here."

day1_break_5.name: 女子生徒A
day1_break_5.text: "Ahh~ This school has nice facilities, but there's nothing fun around here."

day1_break_6.name: 男子生徒B
day1_break_6.text: "For real. There's just a convenience store in front of the school."

day1_break_7.name: 私
day1_break_7.text: *The students laugh lightly. Not a bad atmosphere. I think I can fit in here.*

day1_break_8.name: 私
day1_break_8.text: *Sea slides over and sits beside me.*

day1_break_9.name: ハン・セア
day1_break_9.text: "How's your first class going? Eunsu-sensei is great, right?"

day1_seolhwa_2.name: ハン・セア
day1_seolhwa_2.text: "We're lucky she's our homeroom teacher. She's the most popular teacher in the whole school."

day1_seolhwa_3.name: 私
day1_seolhwa_3.text: *Sea watches Eunsu-sensei and smiles. She seems to really respect her.*

day1_seolhwa_4.name: 私
day1_seolhwa_4.text: *Before the second period starts. Sitting at my desk, I glance behind me.*

day1_seolhwa_6.name: 私
day1_seolhwa_6.text: *Pale skin, long black hair. Eyes gazing somewhere far away.*

day1_seolhwa_choice.name: 私
day1_seolhwa_choice.text: *She feels disconnected from the bustle of the classroom. As if all the noise can't reach her.*
choices: "Hey, I'm {name}. Looks like I'm sitting in front of you."

day1_seolhwa_greet_1.name: 私
day1_seolhwa_greet_1.text: *I hadn't noticed during my introduction earlier... but someone was sitting behind me.*

day1_seolhwa_greet_3.name: 私
day1_seolhwa_greet_3.text: *返事がない。一瞬目が合った気がしたけど、すぐに視線を逸らされた。人見知りが激しいのかな。*

day1_seolhwa_greet_5.name: 私
day1_seolhwa_greet_5.text: 「いや、後ろの子に挨拶したんだけど。」

day1_seolhwa_greet_6.name: 隣の席の男子
day1_seolhwa_greet_6.text: 「ああ、あの子？静かすぎていたかどうかも分かんなかったわ。」

day1_seolhwa_greet_7.name: 私
day1_seolhwa_greet_7.text: *……そうなのか？もう一度後ろを振り返る。女子生徒は……今もそこに座っている。同じ表情のまま。*

day1_seolhwa_greet_8.name: 私
day1_seolhwa_greet_8.text: *ただ存在感がないタイプなのかもしれない。*

day1_seolhwa_greet_9.name: 私
day1_seolhwa_greet_9.text: *……からかってるのか？転校生いじり？まあ、そんなとこだろ。*

day1_seolhwa_greet_10.name: 私
day1_seolhwa_greet_10.text: *流そう。初日に変に絡まれる必要はない。*

day1_seolhwa_greet_11.name: 隣の男子生徒
day1_seolhwa_greet_11.text: "She's so quiet, sometimes I forget she's even there."

day1_seolhwa_greet_13.name: 私
day1_seolhwa_greet_13.text: *I glance back again. Seolhwa is... still sitting there. Same expression. Just looking out the window.*

day1_seolhwa_greet_14.name: 私
day1_seolhwa_greet_14.text: *I guess she's just the introverted type. I'll try talking to her again later.*

day1_seolhwa_greet_15.name: 私
day1_seolhwa_greet_15.text: *...But wait — during roll call at the start of class, I don't remember hearing her name called. Maybe I just missed it.*

day1_morning_end.name: 私
day1_morning_end.text: *やがて午前の授業が終わった。休み時間だ。*
